prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild tavern, warm lighting, cinematic anime style. Ren Emberlane, a masculine scout in a cropped travel jacket and messenger straps, leans over a wooden table and opens a worn leather-bound field journal. He gestures toward a sketch of the Royal Vault seal, inviting Celestia Vale, a feminine fallen princess in a modest travel dress, to observe the details. Clear body action, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot, consistent camera angle and lighting. Celestia Vale leans in closely, her finger tracing a detail on the open journal page while Ren Emberlane watches her reaction, nodding in agreement. They share a focused, cooperative moment as they analyze the breach in the Royal Vault seal together. High-quality anime style, no text, no watermark.
